name: Rava Idli Recipe | Quick Rava Idli (Suji Idli)

ingredients.name: eno
ingredients.notes: fruit salt or ¼ teaspoon baking soda

steps.instruction: Heat 2 tablespoons ghee in a pan. Add the halved cashews and fry till golden. Remove and keep aside.
In the same pan add mustard seeds and let them splutter.
Add chana dal and fry till golden. Then add cumin seeds, curry leaves, asafoetida, ginger and green chillies. Fry for 10 seconds.
Add rava and roast on low heat for 5 to 7 minutes till aromatic and grains look separate.
Let the roasted rava cool slightly. Add grated carrots, chopped coriander leaves and salt.
Add curd and water as required to make medium consistency batter. Mix well and rest covered for 20 minutes.
Grease idli moulds with oil or ghee. Place a fried cashew in the center of each mould.
After resting, add eno or baking soda to the batter and mix gently but quickly.
Pour batter into greased moulds. Steam on medium heat for 10 to 12 minutes.
Let stand for 2 minutes, then demould and serve hot.

tips: Use finer variety of rava like Bombay rava.
Roast rava well in ghee to prevent stickiness.
Eno or baking soda must be fresh for fluffy texture.
You can skip leavening agents but idlis will be denser.
If no idli pan, use cake pan or bowl and slice after steaming.
variations: Add grated vegetables like carrots, beans or peas.
Skip cashews or use roasted peanuts instead.
Make plain rava idli without vegetables or tempering.
